message:
chore: sync beads after deep code review

Created beads for issues found in comprehensive security audit:
- bd-34uu: Email validation accepts invalid addresses
- bd-apwl: Phone validation too permissive
- bd-17w8: URL validation only checks protocol
- bd-3aeo: Dependency override type confusion
- bd-276p: Circular dependency panics instead of error
- bd-u9gw: IP rate limiting spoofable via X-Forwarded-For
- bd-l1qe: CORS credentials + wildcard origins spec violation

Previously fixed (bd-2u48, bd-25h6, bd-2zy6) now in b0cde61.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
